reason: The preregistered 48-case H0 control arm used more inspect/tool turns per case than the engineering estimate. The original limit would stop before the H1 causal comparison, so it cannot answer the registered scientific question.
user_priority: Prefer complete functional and effect validation over an unnecessarily tight API cap.
unchanged_scientific_contract: candidate seed pool and outcome-blind first-four selection
model, relay, probe epoch, and frozen Chronos valuator
target recovery, median gain, risk, scope, and behavior-prediction gates
forbidden: This amendment cannot change a case, threshold, verdict rule, or Harness artifact and cannot be used after inspecting a held-out H1 outcome.
